rationale: In the citing paper, Chevalier and Mayzlin (2006) is cited only once in a grouped literature-review sentence as an example of prior work on online word-of-mouth. The citation is used for broad background positioning of the online communities literature, not for building hypotheses, defining the focal mechanism, or motivating the specific Bayesian influence-identification method. There is no distinct follow-on discussion of this specific study's findings, design, or measures in the model, estimation, or interpretation sections.
